title: Transactional Outbox, Inbox, and Sagas · Go Semantics Case: Dual Write Failure Matrix
summary: A Go 1.26 service team must compose database transaction ownership, relay confirms, duplicate-safe inbox effects, timeouts, and compensation state; reviewers reject hidden goroutine ownership, unbounded work, stale channel state, and claims that stop at a nil client error. The learner predicts values, ownership transitions, and stop paths before seeing a model. steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Predict Dual Write Failure Matrix · Theory Dual Write Failure Matrix
